author: driver--design-phase-4a-render-md-0c67
content: Result: Implemented vitreous_render with full frame pipeline. 6 source files (commands.rs, atlas.rs, pipeline.rs, damage.rs, diff.rs, lib.rs) + 4 WGSL shaders (rect, text, image, shadow). 60 tests all passing. Key features: RenderCommand enum with 9 variants, SDF rounded rectangle shaders with anti-aliasing, shelf-based glyph atlas, image texture cache, damage tracking with region merging, frame-to-frame command diffing, draw call batching (10 consecutive FillRects = 1 draw call), idle frame optimization (zero GPU submissions when nothing changed), stencil-based clipping support, nested opacity.
